Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0D36 "MIAMIVICE-0D36" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Miami Vice (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Patched the STA $027D instruction at $0E18 to be JSR $CE00 instead. A tiny routine to check the port 1 fire button has been placed at $CE00, which if detected, unpauses the game by setting $0DCB to zero. It also performs the original STA $027D instruction so as to keep the original functionality.
Without this patch only the shift-lock key can be used to unpause the game, which in uninuitive and is even more frustrating as the game starts in paused mode!
